title: Mulțumim, Ucraina!
summary: The article argues that Ukraine's resistance against Russia has significantly weakened Moscow's ability to support its allies globally, particularly Iran. It suggests that Trump's aerial campaign against Iran was only possible because Russia, exhausted by the war in Ukraine, can no longer project power or assist Tehran, while China quietly benefits from Russia's economic depletion.
talking_points: Ukraine's resistance has trapped Putin in his own chaos strategy, paralyzing Russia's global military and diplomatic reach
Russia's silence during the Iranian crisis demonstrates its inability to support allies, which should concern other Moscow partners
Trump's campaign against Iran would likely not have been launched if Russia retained its pre-war capacity to intervene
China is patiently exploiting Russia's economic exhaustion, potentially recovering disputed territories like Vladivostok and Sakhalin without military action
Neither Trump nor Netanyahu are likely to acknowledge their strategic debt to Ukraine's sacrifices
author: Desk Russie
